upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pramriyamARe vA rAjanyamAtyaH kulyakumAramuKyAn …vikrAmayet' (kO0 a0 56225) pramriyamARe AsannamaraRe

'guruRABimftA anyato vA'pakzIyamARAH' (ASva0 gf0 471) yezu jIvatsu gururmriyate te guruRABimftAH dvO carABimarO spaSO (ityamaraH) aBimriyata ityaBimaraH prARanirapekzastIkzRAKyaH yo dravyaheto rvyAlaM vA hastinaM vA yoDayatIti svAmI
'taM ha paYca rAjAnaH parimamruH' (E0 brA0 828) paritaH sarvadikzu vartamAnA dvizanto rAjAno mamrurityarTaH
'cirAt kzatrasyAstu pralaya iva GoraH parimaraH' (mahAvIra0 341) parimaro vyApI vinASaH aBivyApakaM kadanam
'tad brahmaRaH parimara ityupAsIta' (tE0 u0 3104) parito mriyante'neneti parimaro vAyuH
